source_name: NBA.com official public team pages; manual non-official UI accent palette; Batch 1 corrected manual curation of 14-player/8-team roster pilot after GPT-5.5 source correction
description: Curated real snapshot containing 30 NBA team identity metadata, non-official UI accent colors, and a Batch 1 corrected 14-player/8-team player identity + roster membership dataset. Expanding frozen as-of real roster pilot: OKC/DEN from F4-B plus BOS/NYK/CLE/MIN/HOU/IND from Batch 1, after GPT-5.5 source correction removed Darius Garland (CLE->LAC) and Jalen Green (HOU->PHX). Identity + roster membership only: no full rosters, no contracts, salaries, cap sheets, injuries, scouting, rumors, or logos.
limitations: Teams metadata, non-official UI accent visual metadata, and 14-player/8-team identity + roster membership only
Batch 1 after GPT-5.5 source correction covers 8 teams (OKC:2, DEN:2, BOS:2, NYK:2, CLE:1, MIN:2, HOU:1, IND:2) and 14 players; not a full roster for any team
CLE has 1 player (Donovan Mitchell) and HOU has 1 player (Alperen Sengun) after source correction; no replacement players were added
No contract, salary, cap, injury, scouting, rumor, or live data
Birthdate/height/weight intentionally null for all players
No team logos or visual assets
Not live data; does not reflect transactions after as_of_date
Do not use for trade/signing recommendations
